name: script-patcher
description: Patch matched JavaScript files with sandboxed user-defined rules.

scripts.prepare:Common:assets: npm run copy:Common:assets:img && npm run minify:Common:assets:options && npm run minify:Common:assets:js
scripts.prepare:Common:assets:Chrome: npm run copy:Common:assets:img:Chrome && npm run minify:Common:assets:options:Chrome && npm run minify:Common:assets:js:Chrome
scripts.prepare:Common:assets:FireFox: npm run copy:Common:assets:img:FireFox && npm run minify:Common:assets:options:FireFox && npm run minify:Common:assets:js:FireFox
scripts.copy:Common:assets:img: npm rum copy:Common:assets:img:Chrome && npm rum copy:Common:assets:img:FireFox
scripts.copy:Common:assets:img:Chrome: shx mkdir -p Chrome/assets/img && shx cp -r Common/assets/img Chrome/assets
scripts.copy:Common:assets:img:FireFox: shx mkdir -p FireFox/assets/img && shx cp -r Common/assets/img FireFox/assets
scripts.minify:Common:assets:options: npm rum minify:Common:assets:options:Chrome && npm run minify:Common:assets:options:FireFox
scripts.minify:Common:assets:options:Chrome: npm rum minify:Common:assets:options:html:Chrome && npm run minify:Common:assets:options:js:Chrome
scripts.minify:Common:assets:options:FireFox: npm rum minify:Common:assets:options:html:FireFox && npm run minify:Common:assets:options:js:FireFox
scripts.minify:Common:assets:options:html: npm rum minify:Common:assets:options:html:Chrome && npm run minify:Common:assets:options:html:FireFox
scripts.minify:Common:assets:options:js: npm rum minify:Common:assets:options:js:Chrome && npm run minify:Common:assets:options:js:FireFox
scripts.minify:Common:assets:options:js:Chrome: npm run prepare:terser:config && terser Common/options.js --config-file terser.config.json -o Chrome/options.js
scripts.minify:Common:assets:options:js:FireFox: npm run prepare:terser:config && terser Common/options.js --config-file terser.config.json -o FireFox/options.js
scripts.minify:Common:assets:js:file:WebpageNoti: npm run prepare:terser:config && terser Common/assets/js/WebpageNotification.js --config-file terser.config.json -o Chrome/assets/js/WebpageNotification.js
npm run prepare:terser:config && terser Common/assets/js/WebpageNotification.js --config-file terser.config.json -o FireFox/assets/js/WebpageNotification.js
